title: sertula neapolitana
intro: Sertula neapolitana, also known as the Burdock or Cocklebur, is a biennial plant native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Sertula neapolitana include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Sertula neapolitana can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
